issue.title: Filter question
issue.body:
### Prerequisites

- [x] This site DOES NOT contain sexually explicit material, otherwise use [NSFW-specific form](./new?template=bug_report_NSFW.yml);
- [x] Filters were updated before reproducing an issue;
- [x] AdGuard product version is up-to-date;
- [x] Browser version is up-to-date;
- [x] If the site or app is broken, disabling AdGuard protection resolves an issue.

### What product do you use?

AdGuard for Windows

### AdGuard version

Latest

### What type of problem have you encountered?

Website or app doesn't work properly

### Which browser(s) do you use?

Chrome

### Which device do you use?

Desktop

### Where is the problem encountered?

https://lifetimeofwellbeing.com

### Ad Blocking

AdGuard Base filter

### Privacy

AdGuard URL Tracking filter

### Social Widgets

AdGuard Social Media filter

### Annoyances

AdGuard Annoyances filter

### Security

Online Malicious URL Blocklist

### Other

_No response_

### DNS filters

AdGuard DNS filter

### Language-specific

_No response_

### What Stealth Mode options do you have enabled?

_No response_

### Add your comment and screenshots

An issue I seem to be challenged with is allowing the help beacon on my own websites. I have a few filters setup for this but they don't seem to work. Hoping you all can help me out. With adGuard turned on, I see this in the console.

Navigated to https://lifetimeofwellbeing.com/insights/
jquery-migrate.min.js:2 JQMIGRATE: Migrate is installed, version 3.4.1
insights/:640 animation has been set up
hsd-beacon.js:1  GET https://beacon-v2.helpscout.net/ net::ERR_NAME_NOT_RESOLVED
a @ hsd-beacon.js:1

The beacons show up when it's disabled and no errors in console.

Here are the two filters I have in place.

@@||hsd-beacon.js^$important,script
@@||[beacon-v2.helpscout.net](http://beacon-v2.helpscout.net/)^$important,document

### Privacy

- [x] I agree to follow this condition

comment.body: Unfortunately, neither of these worked for me. I'm going to keep digging at this, so if any other ideas come up, I'd greatly appreciate it.

issue.title: www.paramountplus.com

labels.name: T: Incorrect Blocking
labels.description: Website or app not working properly due to filtering

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking)
[https://www.paramountplus.com/](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.paramountplus.com%2F)

### Comment
> Paramount+ app on Amazon fire stick shows thumbnails but when the media is asked to play the screen goes black and no media will stream this started on April 10, 2026



### Screenshots
<details>
  <summary>Screenshot 1</summary>

  ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/782d1zhl8eg40wocw48ggco4scgs0wssm8oztv8fpc.jpg?nc=1)
</details>

<details>
  <summary>Screenshot 1 with AdGuard disabled</summary>

  ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/yw0y3442o2okcock8wsk40kgw8ogkwtnp9b0yl3j4g.jpg?nc=1)
</details>

### System configuration

| Information | Value |
|-------------|-------|
AdGuard product: | AdGuard DNS
DNS setup: | Router
DNS server: | Default

System version: | `Ubiquity ui gateway`
Browser: | Amazon fire stick Paramount+ app
